Predatory app, and I had a lot of bad experience in terms of dating. A lot of people use it for hook ups, but they manipulate people by saying and showing on the profile that they want a relationship in the beginning but then end up showing their true intentions. Basically it's like Tinder. I thought I'd meet the love of my life but ended up being traumatised by some of it's abusive users.

Purchased a lifetime subscription then used if for a couple months before I unistalled it. Reinstalled it to try it out again, and now the subscription is not there. ** Update: All issues have been resolved.
